# ISSUE_TEMPLATE Directory — GitHub Issue Templates

## Overview
The `ISSUE_TEMPLATE` directory defines the structure, metadata, and user experience for all GitHub issues created in this repository. These templates ensure consistent reporting, standardized triage, and predictable formatting across all issue types to maintain an enterprise-grade operational baseline.

---

## 📁 Issue Template Registry

* [bug_report.yml](./bug_report.yml) — Standardized input form for problem or unexpected behavior tracking.
* [config.yml](./config.yml) — Global repository configuration that disables unformatted issue generation and routes general queries to Discussions.
* [feature_request.yml](./feature_request.yml) — Structured intake parameters for framework enhancements and features.
